description: Working as a Senior Backend Developer in healthcare-related projects for AdvanceCare, focused on backend development, REST APIs, integrations, background jobs, and production support within the .NET ecosystem.
responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain backend services and REST APIs using C# and .NET 6.
Develop scheduled background jobs to support business-critical healthcare processes.
Integrate backend systems with external services using Azure services such as Blob Storage and API Management.
Implement and support secure authentication mechanisms using JWT.
Participate in backend solution design discussions, technical analysis, and effort estimation.
Support the full software development lifecycle, from development and testing to deployment and production monitoring.
Contribute to troubleshooting, issue analysis, and stabilization of enterprise healthcare systems.
Work closely with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable, maintainable, and scalable backend solutions.

description: Worked as a Senior Fullstack Developer in a web development team responsible for delivering custom enterprise solutions tailored to different client business needs.
responsibilities: Developed web applications using C#, .NET Core 3, Angular 9, and TypeScript.
Built backend features, APIs, and business logic using the .NET ecosystem.
Worked with the .NET Zero boilerplate to accelerate the development of enterprise web applications.
Delivered tailor-made solutions adapted to specific client requirements across multiple industries.
Contributed to mobile application development using Xamarin Forms, Xamarin.Android, Xamarin.iOS, and React Native.
Worked on custom solutions based on nopCommerce, including platform configuration, custom development, and feature adaptation.
Created and adapted custom functionality for business requirements not available out of the box.
Collaborated with multidisciplinary teams to deliver web and mobile solutions for clients in sectors such as retail, healthcare, insurance, public sector, and business services.

description: Worked as a .NET Fullstack Developer in the development team responsible for banking solutions for Millennium BCP, mainly in the credit area.
responsibilities: Developed and maintained internal banking applications using C#, .NET Framework, SQL Server, Web Forms, Windows Services, and SOAP web services.
Worked on corrective and evolutionary development of business-critical banking systems.
Supported legacy enterprise applications across multiple layers, including database, backend services, and user interface.
Analysed bugs, implemented fixes, and delivered new features under strict banking quality and reliability standards.
Worked with SQL Server for data access, troubleshooting, and support of business logic.
Contributed to the stability, maintainability, and evolution of internal applications used in the banking sector.
Gained strong experience working with legacy systems, enterprise constraints, and production-sensitive environments.

description: Started professional career as a Junior Developer, working on tailored business and billing solutions using PHC and Primavera systems.
responsibilities: Developed and maintained business-oriented solutions using C# and .NET.
Worked on custom billing and financial integration solutions based on PHC and Primavera.
Developed an internal scheduling and financial integration tool using C# .NET.
Created and adapted reports using Crystal Reports.
Worked with SQL to support reporting, data analysis, and business processes.
Gained strong foundations in business software, reporting, database handling, and customer-oriented development.
